name: Poor Yorick
description:
An indie comic / zine: a short illustrated riff on Hamlet's graveyard scene — a gleeful jester bursting up out of a giant skull, surrounded by a sea of little skulls. Bright two-tone (cream/teal on red halftone) pop-art style.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- A small-press indie art object — the kind of thing you don't find again.
- Charming, witty, and quick; a fun coffee-table or shelf curio.
- Pairs naturally with To Be or Not To Be (Hamlet + skull + mortality).
- Slim, light, easy to gift.
